DESCRIPTION: Artificially inflated schedule buffer masks delays, hurting genuine EOT claims.
STANDARD_MITIGATION: Maintain transparent schedules; conduct independent schedule reviews.

DESCRIPTION: Productivity loss and work stoppages due to extreme summer temperatures.
STANDARD_MITIGATION: Schedule critical outdoor work during cooler months; provide adequate cooling.

DESCRIPTION: Delays at port or customs for internationally sourced materials.
STANDARD_MITIGATION: Maintain buffer stock; pre-approve suppliers; source locally where possible.

DESCRIPTION: Longer than expected time to receive NOCs and building permits.
STANDARD_MITIGATION: Ensure complete and accurate submissions; engage a dedicated permits manager.

DESCRIPTION: Soil conditions differ from the initial report, requiring design changes.
STANDARD_MITIGATION: Perform comprehensive soil investigation; include contingency in foundation budget.
